name: Third-Party Resource Detector
content:
(function(){var d=document;var currentHost=window.location.hostname;function extractDomain(url){try{return new URL(url).hostname;}catch(e){return url;}}function getBaseDomain(domain){var parts=domain.split('.');if(parts.length<=2)return domain;var baseDomain=parts.slice(parts.length-2).join('.');return baseSiteDomain;}var baseSiteDomain=getBaseDomain(currentHost);var externalResources=[];var links=d.getElementsByTagName('link');var scripts=d.getElementsByTagName('script');for(var i=0;iExternal Resources';if(externalResources.length===0){html+='
No external resources found.
';}else{html+='
Found '+externalResources.length+' truly external resources:
';externalResources.forEach(function(resource,index){var color=resource.type==='CSS'?'#06a':(resource.type==='JS'?'#850':'#444');html+='
'+resource.type+' #'+(index+1)+'
'+resource.url+'
';});}html+='
Close
';c.innerHTML=html;d.body.appendChild(c);document.getElementById('external-resources-close-btn').addEventListener('click',function(){c.remove();});})();
description: Lists all external CSS and JavaScript files loaded from external domains
